response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Full Stack Engineer with over 11 years of relevant experience, exceeding the 6+ years requirement. His expertise spans TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, with additional experience in Kotlin/Java, aligning well with the primary and secondary stack. He has contributed to high-scale systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and enterprise automation tooling, showcasing strong architecture and problem-solving skills. His open-source contributions and leadership in workshops further validate his technical depth and collaborative mindset.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, matching the primary stack requirements
Proven track record in building scalable systems and AI-agent infrastructure, demonstrating strong architecture and innovation skills
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership, including workshops and talks, indicating a collaborative and knowledge-sharing mindset
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js, Vitest, and Kubernetes, which are part of the primary stack requirements
No explicit mention of AWS, GCP, or Azure expertise, which are required for cloud platform knowledge
Some employment gaps and frequent role changes may raise questions about long-term commitment

key_factors.factor: Full stack expertise with primary stack technologies
Experience with scalable systems and AI-agent development
Lack of direct experience with Nest.js, Vitest, and Kubernetes
